calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Thomas M. DiFranco, Esq., appearing on his own behalf. Order to Show Cause to all Counsel for failure to Obtain Judgment or file Dismissal folowing Binding Arbitration is heard this day. There being no appearance by Cross-Defendant nor an objection by Plaintiff present in court. Court ordered Cross-Complaint dismissed in its entirety pursuant to CCP Sections 583.310 and 583.360. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2007 Continued To Nov-15-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO ALL COUNSEL for failure to obtain judgment or file a dismissal following binding arbitration is ordered continued to 11/15/2007 at 10:30 AM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard CSR# 11055. (212)
